description_long: This object is a rectangular filing cabinet with a dark wood grain finish, featuring a subtle sheen and visible horizontal wood patterns on all sides. The cabinet has clean, sharp edges and a seamless appearance, with no visible handles, drawers, or hardware on any face. The top surface is flat and broad, suitable for placing items, while the sides and front are uniformly paneled, giving it a minimalist, modern look. There are no visible label holders, locks, or decorative elements, emphasizing a sleek and understated design. The cabinet appears solid and robust, likely constructed from wood or wood composite materials. Its size and finish suggest it is intended for indoor use, possibly in an office or home office environment.
description: A dark wood grain filing cabinet with a seamless, minimalist design and no visible handles or hardware. The cabinet is rectangular, sturdy, and has a flat top surface.
description_view_0: The front view shows a flat, dark wood panel with horizontal grain and no visible handles or drawers.
description_view_1: This side view displays the same wood grain pattern and seamless paneling, with no distinguishing features.
description_view_2: The rear or opposite side view mirrors the front, maintaining the uniform wood finish and lack of hardware.
description_view_3: Another side view, identical to the previous, with continuous wood grain and no visible openings or handles.
